pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 11 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would continue to compile against Java 8 targets, failing to utilize Java 11 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 11-specific APIs are used without proper module path configuration.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility checks.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/src/main/java/de.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 source/target levels, failing to utilize Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility checks.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 8 semantics, failing to leverage Java 11 features or enforce Java 11 compatibility checks.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven project property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 8 language features and APIs, failing to leverage or enforce Java 11 compatibility.
